projectDescription: Hades OS — multi-user auth isolation for shared Hermes runtime. Backend owns identity, isolation, memory retrieval. Hermes is shared; user context is not shared.

railwayHermesFix.title: Railway Fix With Hermes-Required Runtime
principles: Layer 2: Backend container must include Hermes CLI
No Hermes, no successful Hades chat (production rule)
No direct OpenRouter fallback, no mock Hermes fallback, no generic AI fallback
Shared Hermes binary is fine; shared local user memory is not fine
Durable multi-user memory belongs in Supabase, scoped by auth user_id

writableState.rule: Disposable or isolated; not durable multi-user memory

cors.behavior: Allows configured origins + localhost + no-origin; rejects random browser origins

authScoping.productionRule: userId from verified auth token, never HADES_USER_ID

packaging.preferred: Install Hermes from package/source during Railway build or use backend/Dockerfile if Python/system deps needed
